creator: jgh@FreeBSD.org
text:
This is the wrong approach. Here is a patch to fix the port. This will put
the correct options into the port, and I've also modified it so there is a
different packagename. Currently, this would be unable to be installed
through packages, because it is the same packagename as x11/xlockmore.

Index: Makefile
===================================================================
--- Makefile    (revision 337074)
+++ Makefile    (working copy)
@@ -7,7 +7,8 @@

 MASTERDIR=     ${.CURDIR}/../../x11/xlockmore

-WITH_MB=       yes
+PORT_OPTIONS=  MB
+PKGNAMEPREFIX= ja-
 XLOCKMORE_LANG=        ja

 .include "${MASTERDIR}/Makefile"
